prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: primary game title lockup for a sci-fi post-apocalyptic tactics RPG
Primary request: create a lore-driven transparent logo for RENATIONS TACTICS
Subject: RENATIONS as the dominant wordmark with TACTICS as the secondary line, designed for a world where stranded time-travel scientists, Antarctic bunker-templars, deep-ocean descendants, and ascetic psychic orders collide after civilizational collapse
Style/medium: premium logo design, transparent background, vector-friendly silhouette feel, elegant but hard-edged lettering that blends relic futurism, ruined imperial typography, and military command-interface restraint
Composition/framing: centered horizontal title lockup, highly readable over dark backdrops, no scenery, no mockup
Lighting/mood: cold steel and pale ivory lettering with restrained brass and dark wine accents, severe, strategic, apocalyptic, not heroic fantasy
Color palette: ivory, pale steel, aged brass, dark wine, ash black
Design language: subtle fractured orbital arc or signal-line geometry, bunker-tech cuts, chrono-instrument detailing, pressure-seal notches, ruin-era wear kept minimal; no swords, no dragon crests, no medieval shield emblem
Quality: high
Constraints: transparent background, no scenery, no glow haze, no overcomplicated crest, no soft fantasy flourishes, no esports branding, no sci-fi neon, no unreadable texture noise
Avoid: generic fantasy crest, giant sword through text, cartoon apocalypse, calligraphy, chrome bevel excess, low-contrast pale-on-pale rendering

Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: alternate primary game title lockup for a sci-fi post-apocalyptic tactics RPG
Primary request: create a second transparent logo direction for RENATIONS TACTICS
Subject: RENATIONS as the dominant wordmark with TACTICS smaller below or nested, shaped by the fiction of broken civilizations, future-tech remnants, ash-choked warfronts, and ritualized military orders
Style/medium: premium logo design with a cleaner industrial-seraphic hybrid, transparent background, vector-friendly silhouette feel
Composition/framing: centered horizontal lockup, strong readability at title-screen scale and medium UI scale, no scenery, no mockup
Lighting/mood: stern, controlled, post-collapse, strategic; less fantasy ornament, more relic-tech monumentality
Color palette: weathered ivory, oxidized steel, muted brass, dark wine, soot black
Design language: restrained orbital eclipse cues, segmented military plate forms, engraved signal marks, bunker-seal geometry, subtle asymmetry that suggests a fractured world; no sword iconography and no medieval coat-of-arms read
Quality: high
Constraints: transparent background, no scenery, no glow fog, no mockup, no subtitle other than TACTICS, no excessive ornament, no unreadable detail
Avoid: generic fantasy RPG logo, anime game logo, neon cyberpunk, esports emblem, soft decorative flourishes, low-contrast rendering
